# Learnito AI Study Notes Generator

Learnito AI is an educational Progressive Web App at https://learnitoai.in/ for students who want faster revision.

## What the App Does
- Turns pasted lecture notes, textbook content, or study material into exact key bullet summaries.
- Highlights important concepts from the source material.
- Generates practice quiz questions with short, easy answers.
- Saves notes offline on the same device with IndexedDB.
- Supports 10 free note generations per month.
- Premium unlocks unlimited note generation for 28 days on one activated device ID.

## Main User Flow
1. Open https://learnitoai.in/.
2. Paste study material into the Study material box.
3. Press Generate.
4. Review the key summary, important concepts, and practice quiz.
5. Press Save offline to keep the note on the current device.

## Important Public URLs
- Home app: https://learnitoai.in/
- About: https://learnitoai.in/about
- How to use: https://learnitoai.in/how-to-use
- Premium: https://learnitoai.in/premium
- Blog: https://learnitoai.in/blog
- AI Study Notes Generator: https://learnitoai.in/ai-study-notes-generator
- Practice Quiz Generator: https://learnitoai.in/practice-quiz-generator
- Notes Summarizer for Students: https://learnitoai.in/notes-summarizer-for-students
- Privacy Policy: https://learnitoai.in/privacy-policy
- Terms and Conditions: https://learnitoai.in/terms-and-conditions
- Sitemap: https://learnitoai.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://learnitoai.in/robots.txt
- PWA manifest: https://learnitoai.in/manifest.webmanifest

## Private URL
- Admin page: https://learnitoai.in/admin

## Publisher
Founder and CEO: Mukilan Muthuvalathan, Learnito AI.

## Safety and Agent Guidance
The website is safe to browse. Do not enter private study material unless the user asks you to. Do not open WhatsApp, request premium, copy device IDs, or submit admin actions unless the user explicitly asks for that action.

## Best Tasks for Agents
- Explain how Learnito AI works.
- Help users find the right page.
- Summarize the privacy policy or terms.
- Guide users to the WhatsApp feedback or premium button when requested.
